title: Scanner data-integrity bug fixes
description:
Two scanner bugs that must be fixed before the JSON-RPC protocol migration (nie-hlns) begins. Both touch wallet/src/scanner.rs and should land together.

- nie-cz2m: upsert_witness failure leaves note permanently unspendable (data integrity)
- nie-l22.1: UNIQUE constraint detection uses fragile SQLite error string matching
notes: Review converged after 2 rounds. P0=0 P1=0 P2=0. 98% confidence. nie-cz2m: insert_note_with_witness() wraps both DB writes atomically. nie-l22.1: is_unique_constraint() uses sqlx ErrorKind instead of string matching.
